name: Farmers And Merchants Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank serving Milligan, NE and Cawker City, KS with personal and agricultural lending, checking, savings, and digital banking services.
description_long:
Farmers & Merchants Bank is a community-based FDIC-insured bank operating in rural Nebraska and Kansas. The institution serves both personal and agricultural customers with a focus on local relationship banking in smaller markets. The bank maintains physical locations in Milligan, NE and Cawker City, KS while offering modern digital banking capabilities.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of deposit and lending products including personal checking and savings accounts, Money Market Accounts, IRAs, HSAs, Certificates of Deposit, personal loans, home mortgages, auto loans, agricultural loans, business loans, and both personal and business credit cards. They provide competitive CD rates (4.58% APY for 6-month CDs, 4.11% for 12-month CDs) and IRA rates (4.27% APY). Digital services include free online banking, a mobile banking app, CardValet debit card management, surcharge-free ATM access, and remote merchant capture for businesses.

The bank distinguishes itself through dedicated agricultural lending products, reflecting its service area and customer base, and maintains accessibility features including AudioEye enabled website optimization. They offer financial calculators and tools to help customers make informed decisions, plus a switch service to facilitate account transfers from other institutions.

As a small rural community bank, Farmers & Merchants Bank is best suited for customers in their service areas (Milligan, NE and Cawker City, KS) or those with agricultural/farming interests. The limited geographic footprint and smaller institution size means fewer branch locations compared to national banks, though they compensate with digital banking options. Rates are competitive but customers should compare with larger regional banks for some products. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts (Basic Checking and NOW Accounts)
Personal savings accounts (Regular Savings and Money Market Accounts)
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with competitive rates
Personal loans and personal term loans
Digital banking (online and mobile app), CardValet debit card management, surcharge-free ATMs, and remote merchant capture
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Competitive CD rates (4.58% APY for 6-month, 4.11% for 12-month CDs) with low $500 minimums
Specialized agricultural lending products designed for farmers
Free online banking and mobile app for convenient account access
Surcharge-free ATM network included with accounts
CardValet debit card management and fraud protection tools
Accessibility-optimized website with AudioEye toolbar for users with disabilities
cons: Limited geographic footprint (only Milligan, NE and Cawker City, KS locations) restricts accessibility for most consumers
No information about minimum account balances or monthly fees provided on website
Limited branch network means fewer ATM locations compared to regional/national banks outside their service areas
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or retirement planning beyond basic IRAs
best_for: Farmers and agricultural business owners seeking specialized ag lending and rural banking services
Residents of Milligan, Nebraska and Cawker City, Kansas seeking local community bank relationships
Customers seeking FDIC-insured savings with competitive CD rates and low account minimums
Small business owners in the service area needing business checking, loans, and merchant services
diagnosis: Farmers & Merchants Bank is ideal for agricultural customers, farmers, and residents in Milligan, Nebraska or Cawker City, Kansas seeking FDIC-insured community banking with personalized service. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—this bank only serves two small rural communities, making it inaccessible for most consumers outside these areas.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
